title: Purchasing Agents, Except Wholesale, Retail, and Farm Products
description: Purchase machinery, equipment, tools, parts, supplies, or services necessary for the operation of an establishment. Purchase raw or semifinished materials for manufacturing. May negotiate contracts.

tasks.text: Monitor and follow applicable laws and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Purchase the highest quality merchandise at the lowest possible price and in correct amounts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Formulate policies and procedures for bid proposals and procurement of goods and services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare purchase orders, solicit bid proposals, and review requisitions for goods and services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Write and review product specifications, maintaining a working technical knowledge of the goods or services to be purchased.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze price proposals, financial reports, and other data and information to determine reasonable prices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Hire, train, or supervise purchasing clerks, buyers, and expediters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research and evaluate suppliers, based on price, quality, selection, service, support, availability, reliability, production and distribution capabilities, and the supplier's reputation and history.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate and monitor contract performance to ensure compliance with contractual obligations and to determine need for changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate, renegotiate, and administer contracts with suppliers, vendors, and other representatives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study sales records and inventory levels of current stock to develop strategic purchasing programs that facilitate employee access to supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with staff, users, and vendors to discuss defective or unacceptable goods or services and determine corrective action.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain and review computerized or manual records of purchased items, costs, deliveries, product performance, and inventories.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor changes affecting supply and demand, tracking market conditions, price trends, or futures markets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor shipments to ensure that goods come in on time, and resolve problems related to undelivered goods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review catalogs, industry periodicals, directories, trade journals, and Internet sites and consult with other department personnel to locate necessary goods and services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend meetings, trade shows, conferences, conventions, and seminars to network with people in other purchasing departments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange the payment of duty and freight charges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview vendors and visit suppliers' plants and distribution centers to examine and learn about products, services, and prices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
